◆ compute_derivative()

int compute_derivative ( int  ThisGrid,
int  first_derivative,
int  second_derivative 
)

Definition at line 255 of file fmax-pfft.c.

256{
257 int swap, local[3], start[3], C[3], N[3], Nhalf[3];
258 double knorm[3];
259
260#ifdef DEBUG
261 sprintf(filename,"results.%d-%d.%d",first_derivative,second_derivative,ThisTask);
262 results=fopen(filename,"w");
263#endif
264
265 // note: for PFFT the transposed order is different when
266 // the subdivision is done either in 1 or higher dimensions.
267 // In 1D the memory order is [ y, x, z ], while in 2D and 3D
268 // it is [ y, z, x].
269
270
271 if(!params.use_transposed_fft)
272 // this is the non-transposed order x, y, z
273 for(int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
274 C[i] = i;
275 else
276 {
277 if(internal.tasks_subdivision_dim > 1)
278 C[0] = _y_, C[1] = _z_, C[2] = _x_;
279 else
280 C[0] = _y_, C[1] = _x_, C[2] = _z_;
281 }
282
283 for(int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
284 {
285 // grid number
286 N[i] = GRID.GSglobal[C[i]];
287 // Nyquist frequencies
288 Nhalf[i] = N[i] / 2;
289 // k vectors
290 knorm[i] = 2.*PI / (double)GRID.GSglobal[ C[i] ];
291
292 local[i] = GRID.GSlocal_k[C[i]];
293 start[i] = GRID.GSstart_k[C[i]];
294
295 }
296
297 // for first derivatives the real and imaginary parts must be swapped
298 swap=((first_derivative==0 && second_derivative> 0) ||
299 (first_derivative> 0 && second_derivative==0));
300
301 double growth_rate=1.0;
302
303 // loop over k-space indices
304
305 int idx;
306 for (idx = 0; idx < local[_x_]; idx++)
307 {
308 int ii[3];
309
310 ii[_x_] = idx + start[_x_]; // this is the kx index
311
312 if (ii[_x_] > Nhalf[_x_]) // kx-N if kx > Nx/2
313 ii[_x_] -= N[_x_];
314
315 double k_x = knorm[_x_] * ii[_x_];
316 double k2_0 = k_x * k_x;
317
318 int idy;
319 for (idy = 0; idy < local[_y_]; idy++)
320 {
321 ii[_y_] = idy + start[_y_]; // this is the ky index
322
323 if (ii[_y_] > Nhalf[_y_])
324 ii[_y_] -= N[_y_]; // ky-N if ky > Ny/2
325
326 double k_y = knorm[_y_] * ii[_y_];
327 double k2_1 = k2_0 + k_y * k_y;
328
329 int idz;
330 for (idz = 0; idz < local[_z_]; idz++)
331 {
332 ii[_z_] = idz + start[_z_]; // this is the kz index
333
334 if (ii[_z_] > Nhalf[_z_])
335 ii[_z_] -= N[_z_]; // kz-N if ky > Nz/2
336
337 double k_z = knorm[_z_] * ii[_z_];
338
339 double k_squared = k2_1 + k_z * k_z;
340 double k_module = sqrt(k_squared);
341
342 /* In the scale-dependent case the delta(k) must be multiplied
343 by the relevant growth rate */
344 switch (ScaleDep.order)
345 {
346 case 0:
347 growth_rate = 1.0;
348 break;
349 case 1:
350 growth_rate = GrowingMode(ScaleDep.redshift,k_module);
351 break;
352 case 2:
353 growth_rate = GrowingMode_2LPT(ScaleDep.redshift,k_module);
354 break;
355 case 3:
356 growth_rate = GrowingMode_3LPT_1(ScaleDep.redshift,k_module);
357 break;
358 case 4:
359 growth_rate = GrowingMode_3LPT_2(ScaleDep.redshift,k_module);
360 break;
361 default:
362 growth_rate = 1.0;
363 break;
364 }
365
366 int index = 2*(( idx * local[_y_] + idy ) * local[_z_] + idz);
367
368 if (k_squared != 0.)
369 {
370
371 // Gaussian smoothing window
372 double smoothing = exp(-0.5 * k_squared * Rsmooth * Rsmooth);
373
374 double diff_comp[4];
375
376 // the components are stored in the vectors that control the differentiation
377
378 diff_comp[0] = 1.0;
379 diff_comp[1] = k_x;
380 diff_comp[2] = k_y;
381 diff_comp[3] = k_z;
382
383 double green = greens_function(diff_comp, k_squared, first_derivative, second_derivative);
384
385 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[0] *= green * smoothing * growth_rate;
386 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[1] *= green * smoothing * growth_rate;
387 }
388
389 if (swap)
390 {
391 double tmp = (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[1];
392 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[1] = (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[0];
393 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[0] = -tmp;
394 }
395 }
396 }
397 }
398
399 /* int idy, idz, index; */
400 /* for (idx = 0; idx < local[_x_]; idx++) */
401 /* for (idy = 0; idy < local[_y_]; idy++) */
402 /* for (idz = 0; idz < local[_z_]; idz++) */
403 /* { */
404 /* index = 2*(( idx * local[_y_] + idy ) * local[_z_] + idz); */
405 /* printf(" %3d %3d %3d %6d %8f %8f\n", */
406 /* idx,idy,idz,index,cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2][0],cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2][1]); */
407 /* } */
408
409 /* char name[60]; */
410 /* char coord[4] = {' ', 'x', 'y', 'z'}; */
411 /* sprintf(name, "c_before_derivative.1.%c", coord[first_derivative]); */
412 /* dump_cvector((double*)cvector_fft[ThisGrid], params.use_transposed_fft*internal.tasks_subdivision_dim, */
413 /* MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal[_x_], */
414 /* MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k, */
415 /* MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k, name, 0); */
416
417
418 if (!ThisTask)
419 dprintf(VMSG, 0, "[%s] compute_derivative: starting fft\n",fdate());
420
421 {
422 double time = reverse_transform(ThisGrid);
423
424 if (!ThisTask)
425 dprintf(VMSG, 0, "[%s] compute_derivative: done fft, cpu time = %f\n",fdate(),time);
426
427 cputime.fft+=time;
428 }
429
430 /* for (int local_x = 0; local_x < MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal[_x_]; local_x++) */
431 /* for (int local_y = 0; local_y < MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal[_y_]; local_y++) */
432 /* for (int local_z = 0; local_z < MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal[_z_]; local_z++) */
433 /* { */
434 /* index=local_x + MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal[_x_] * (local_y + local_z * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal[_y_]); */
435 /* printf(" %3d %3d %3d %6d %8f\n",local_x,local_y,local_z,index,rvector_fft[ThisGrid][index]); */
436 /* } */
437
438 fflush(stdout);
439
440 return 0;
441}

◆ compute_fft_plans()

int compute_fft_plans ( )

Definition at line 139 of file fmax-pfft.c.

140{
141 ptrdiff_t DIM[3];
142 int pfft_flags;
143 int ThisGrid;
144
145 dprintf(VMSG, 0, "[%s] Computing fft plans\n",fdate());
146
147 for (ThisGrid = 0; ThisGrid < Ngrids; ThisGrid++)
148 {
149
150 DIM[_x_] = GRID.GSglobal[_x_];
151 DIM[_y_] = GRID.GSglobal[_y_];
152 DIM[_z_] = GRID.GSglobal[_z_];
153
154 /* create plan for out-of-place DFT */
155
156 //pfft_flags = PFFT_MEASURE | PFFT_TUNE;
157 //pfft_flags = PFFT_MEASURE ;
158 pfft_flags = 0;
159 if(params.use_transposed_fft)
160 pfft_flags |= PFFT_TRANSPOSED_OUT;
161#ifdef USE_FFT_THREADS
162 fftw_plan_with_nthreads(internal.nthreads_fft);
163#endif
164 GRID.forward_plan = pfft_plan_dft_r2c_3d(DIM, rvector_fft[ThisGrid], cvector_fft[ThisGrid],
165 FFT_Comm, PFFT_FORWARD, pfft_flags);
166
167
168 DIM[_x_] = GRID.GSglobal[_x_];
169 DIM[_y_] = GRID.GSglobal[_y_];
170 DIM[_z_] = GRID.GSglobal[_z_];
171
172 //pfft_flags = PFFT_MEASURE | PFFT_TUNE;
173 //pfft_flags = PFFT_MEASURE;
174 pfft_flags = 0;
175 if(params.use_transposed_fft)
176 pfft_flags |= PFFT_TRANSPOSED_IN;
177#ifdef USE_FFT_THREADS
178 fftw_plan_with_nthreads(internal.nthreads_fft);
179#endif
180 GRID.reverse_plan = pfft_plan_dft_c2r_3d(DIM, cvector_fft[ThisGrid], rvector_fft[ThisGrid],
181 FFT_Comm, PFFT_BACKWARD, pfft_flags);
182 }
183
184
185 dprintf(VMSG, 0, "[%s] fft plans done\n",fdate());
186
187 return 0;
188}

◆ dump_cvector()

void dump_cvector ( double *restrict  vector,
int  T,
int  Nmesh,
ptrdiff_t *restrict  local_n,
ptrdiff_t *restrict  local_start,
char *  filename,
int  ThisGrid 
)

Definition at line 634 of file fmax-pfft.c.

646{
647
648 int ii, i, j, k, addr, addr_;
649 int Nmesh_2 = Nmesh / 2;
650 FILE *file;
651 char myfilename[300];
652
653 sprintf(myfilename, "partial_%d", ThisTask);
654
655 for(ii = 0; ii < NTasks; ii++)
656 {
657 if( (ThisTask == ii) &&
658 (local_start[_z_] < Nmesh_2-1) )
659 {
660 file = fopen(myfilename, "w");
661
662 if(T == 1)
663 // transposed order, 1D decomposition
664 {
665 for(j = 0; j < local_n[_y_]; j++)
666 for(i = 0; i < local_n[_x_]; i++)
667 for(k = 0; k < (local_n[_z_]) && (k + local_start[_z_] <= Nmesh_2); k++)
668 {
669 if(internal.dump_kdensity == 1)
670 // write in x,y order of the non-transposed case
671 addr_ = ((i+local_start[_x_])*Nmesh + j+local_start[_y_])*(Nmesh_2+1) + k+local_start[_z_];
672 else
673 // write in natural order
674 addr_ = ((j+local_start[_y_])*Nmesh + i+local_start[_x_])*(Nmesh_2+1) + k+local_start[_z_];
675 addr = 2*((j * local_n[_x_] + i) * local_n[_z_] + k);
676 fprintf(file, "%d - %g %g\n", addr_,
677 vector[addr], vector[addr+1]);
678 }
679
680 }
681 else if(T > 1)
682 // transposed order, 2D or 3D decomposition
683 {
684 for(j = 0; j < local_n[_y_]; j++)
685 for(k = 0; k < (local_n[_z_]) && (k + local_start[_z_] <= Nmesh_2); k++)
686 for(i = 0; i < local_n[_x_]; i++)
687 {
688 if(internal.dump_kdensity == 1)
689 // write in x,y order of the non-transposed case
690 addr_ = ((i+local_start[_x_])*Nmesh + j+local_start[_y_])*(Nmesh_2+1) + k+local_start[_z_];
691 else
692 // write in natural order
693 addr_ = ((j+local_start[_y_])*Nmesh + k+local_start[_z_])*(Nmesh_2+1) + i+local_start[_x_];
694 addr = 2*((j * local_n[_z_] + k) * local_n[_x_] + i);
695 fprintf(file, "%d - %g %g\n", addr_,
696 vector[addr], vector[addr+1]);
697 }
698
699 }
700 else
701 // not transposed
702 {
703 for(i = 0; i < local_n[_x_]; i++)
704 for(j = 0; j < local_n[_y_]; j++)
705 for(k = 0; k < (local_n[_z_]) && (k + local_start[_z_] <= Nmesh_2); k++)
706 {
707 if(internal.dump_kdensity == 2)
708 // write in x,y order of the transposed case (1-D decomposition)
709 addr_ = ((j+local_start[_y_])*Nmesh + i+local_start[_x_])*(Nmesh_2+1) + k+local_start[_z_];
710 else
711 // write in natural order
712 addr_ = ((i+local_start[_x_])*Nmesh + j+local_start[_y_])*(Nmesh_2+1) + k+local_start[_z_];
713 addr = 2*( (i*local_n[_y_] + j)*local_n[_z_] + k);
714 fprintf(file, "%d - %g %g\n", addr_,
715 vector[addr], vector[addr+1]);
716 }
717
718 }
719
720 fflush(file);
721 fclose(file);
722 }
723
724 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
725 }
726
727 if(ThisTask == 0)
728 {
729 int err;
730 sprintf(myfilename, "cat partial_* | sort -k1 -n > %s", filename);
731 err = system(myfilename);
732 err = system("rm -f partial_*");
733 if(err != 0)
734 dprintf(VXX, 0, "something got wrong while writing cvector dump file\n");
735 }
736
737
738 return;
739
740}

763 {

765

◆ greens_function()

double greens_function ( double *  diff_comp,
double  k_squared,
int  first_derivative,
int  second_derivative 
)

Definition at line 444 of file fmax-pfft.c.

445{
446
447 if (first_derivative == -1 && second_derivative == -1)
448 /* in this case the greens_function is simply 1 */
449 return 1.0;
450
451 if (first_derivative==0 && second_derivative==0)
452 return -diff_comp[first_derivative]*diff_comp[second_derivative]/k_squared;
453 else
454 return diff_comp[first_derivative]*diff_comp[second_derivative]/k_squared;
455
456}

227 return MPI_Wtime() - time;
228}

564{
565 /* writes the results of a (first) derivative to the corresponding products */
566 switch (order)
567 {
568 case 1:
569#ifdef _OPENMP
570#pragma omp parallel
571 {
572#pragma omp for nowait
573#endif
574 for (int index = 0; index < MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size; index++)
575 products[index].Vel[ia]=*((double*)rvector_fft[ThisGrid] + index);
576#ifdef _OPENMP
577 }
578#endif
579 break;
580
581#ifdef TWO_LPT
582

584#ifdef _OPENMP
585#pragma omp parallel
586 {
587#pragma omp for nowait
588#endif
589 for (int index = 0; index < MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size; index++)

592 }
593#endif
594 break;
595
596#ifdef THREE_LPT

602#pragma omp for nowait
